name: pi-scraper
description: Crawl, map, and structured extraction for Pi — scraper-first, Pi-native, and local-first.

scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json eval/tool-selection/config.mjs eval/tool-selection/run.mjs eval/tool-selection/score.mjs eval/tool-selection/score.test.mjs eval/tool-selection/run-pi.mjs src/__tests__/config.test.ts src/__tests__/health.test.ts src/__tests__/lifecycle.test.ts src/batch/__tests__/progress-state.test.ts src/batch/progress-state.ts src/commands/__tests__/scrape-config-status.test.ts src/commands/define.ts src/commands/scrape-config-status.ts src/config.ts src/extract/__tests__/vertical/manifest-registry-trust.test.ts src/extract/vertical/loader.ts src/extract/vertical/manifest-registry.ts src/extract/vertical/registry.ts src/health.ts src/index.ts src/lifecycle.ts src/model-adapter/__tests__/pi-ai-adapter.test.ts src/model-adapter/pi-ai-adapter.ts src/tools/__tests__/web-extract.test.ts src/tools/infra/__tests__/documentation-contract.test.ts src/tools/infra/__tests__/model-registry.test.ts src/tools/infra/__tests__/register.test.ts src/tools/infra/__tests__/tool-contract.test.ts src/tools/infra/define.ts src/tools/infra/model-adapter.ts src/tools/infra/register.ts src/tools/web-batch.ts src/tools/web-crawl-run.ts src/tools/web-extract-adhoc.ts src/tools/web-extract-summarize.ts src/tools/web-extract-vertical.ts src/tools/web-extract.ts src/tools/web-tools.ts src/tui/tool-batch.ts src/tui/tool-resource.ts src/tui/tool-status.ts src/tui/tui.ts src/tui/types.ts
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run test:selection && bun run test
